project.name: otis-mrp
project.title: OTIS A01RCDD MRP — Alert Complexity and Placement Volatility
project.paper_title: Alert Complexity and Placement Volatility in Ontario Restrictive Confinement Data
project.author: Vansh Singh Ruhela
project.affiliation: MA candidate, Centre for Criminology and Sociolegal Studies, University of Toronto
project._comment: Project metadata. Used to render README/SECURITY/INSTRUCTIONS templates.

r_packages_optional._comment: Only for the opt-in DML recompute (OTIS_DML_RECOMPUTE=1); NOT needed for the 28 deterministic checks. PREFERRED: install 'rmorie' -> canonical morie_otis_irm_dml runs the recompute in ~10s and reproduces the published effects to <=0.001. FALLBACK (no rmorie): the self-contained DoubleML port uses the packages below and takes ~24 min.

data._comment: Additional file paths to probe before asking the user.

network._comment: Listed in the WHERE EVERYTHING WILL GO panel for transparency.

what_was_done: 5. Cross-checked Double Machine Learning estimates (if .RData input).
6. Wrote every result to its own CSV (numbered 01..07).
7. Wrote manifest.json with expected vs observed for every claim.

expected._recompute_comment: With the optional heavy DML recompute (OTIS_DML_RECOMPUTE=1), the 8 DML checks reproduce from public data within +/-0.02 (reference run matched to ~0.00004) and a 37th aggregate confirmation is added -> 37/37.
